title: real-current overlap score calibration curve
winner_rule: lowest source-run-bootstrap mean synthetic secondary-fraction RMSE; real high-minus-low and leakage sentinels are reported as transfer diagnostics, not optimized

next_tickets.title: P05e support-matched overlap calibration with external acquisition covariates
next_tickets.body: Question: does the P05d winner remain calibrated after conditioning on run-family acquisition covariates and S16 baseline-support atoms, or is the apparent secondary-fraction calibration a support-mixture effect? Traditional method: constrained two-pulse template calibration within exact support cells. ML/NN methods: ridge, gradient-boosted trees, MLP, 1D-CNN, and a monotone support-gated ensemble, split by run with bootstrap CIs. Expected information gain: separates transferable overlap physics from current/run support leakage before any real-current recovery correction is adopted.
